creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 202641
Patch to fix sope3

The problem is described here:

https://sogo.nu/bugs/view.php?id=4659

The patch linked to at the end of the bug report fix the issue:

https://github.com/inverse-inc/sope/commit/2ca5842d863fd9f25593c6b608f5a1954f79d345

I think it's worth integrating it into devel/sope3 port?
